# Pull request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] ruff check .
- [ ] pytest
- [ ] amo scan
- [ ] amo graph build
- [ ] amo validate --strict
- [ ] amo status

## AMO memory

- [ ] Updated `.ai/state.md` if project truth changed.
- [ ] Updated `.ai/tasks.md` if roadmap or next steps changed.
- [ ] Updated `.ai/decisions.md` if a durable decision was made.

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, or follow-up work here.
